# weak-skill

This skill helps you do things. Consider using it as appropriate, depending on the situation.

## What it does

Do the task. Be flexible about how you approach it. If needed, handle any errors that come up.

## Steps

1. Look at the input.
2. Do something useful with it.
3. Return a result.

Use your judgment throughout. There are many ways to approach this — pick whatever seems best.
